vocab.meaning: hình thức quan trọng hơn công năng
vocab.example: Many fashionistas tend to choose form over function, wearing towering heels that look stunning but are incredibly painful.

vocab.meaning: chịu khổ vì thời trang (chấp nhận đau đớn để mặc đẹp)
vocab.example: Some people are perfectly willing to suffer for fashion if a pair of shoes helps them make a bold statement.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ phổ biến, đang là mốt
vocab.example: Chunky sneakers are all the rage right now because they manage to look trendy while being very soft on the feet.

vocab.meaning: phải trả giá bằng, làm hại đến cái gì
vocab.example: I personally wouldn't buy designer boots at the expense of my own comfort and foot health.

vocab.meaning: tìm cách cân bằng giữa hai yếu tố
vocab.example: Most consumers today try to strike a balance between a polished look and ergonomic support.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: High-end shoes that are both stylish and comfortable often cost an arm and a leg.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ chỉn chu, lộng lẫy
vocab.example: When people are dressed to the nines for a gala, they usually prioritize aesthetics over the feel of their footwear.

vocab.meaning: mỗi người một ý, tùy sở thích mỗi người
vocab.example: Some prefer comfort, others prefer style; I guess it's each to their own when it comes to shopping for shoes.
Younger generations often pick visually striking shoes to stand out from the crowd, even if they aren't the best for walking.
You can find decent shoes that are easy on the feet without having to break the bank for luxury brands.
